google.user.label: Google Account Email
google.user.help: Owner of the calendar(s) being controlled.

google.clientId.label: Google OAuth Client ID
google.clientId.help: Reuses the Gmail Desktop OAuth client; just add the calendar scope.

google.refreshToken.label: Google OAuth Refresh Token
google.refreshToken.help: Same refresh token as Gmail if you re-ran the auth helper with both scopes.

defaultCalendarId.label: Default Calendar ID
defaultCalendarId.help: Calendar used when the agent doesn't specify one.

timezone.label: Timezone
timezone.help: Timezone for relative dates and free-time queries.

writeEnabled.label: Allow Writes
writeEnabled.help: Disable to make the agent read-only on your calendar.
